nodes.label: Home Top — Premium Banner + Greeting + Concentration Section
nodes.description: Home screen top section with device frame visible. Top: PREMIUM card/banner with orange gradient background, label 'PREMIUM', title 'Tu mente sin límites', subtitle 'Acceso ilimitado · descargas offline · sin anuncios', CTA button 'Probar 7 días gratis' and price '$10/mes'. Pagination dots below banner. Below: personalized greeting 'Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para tu ritual de hoy?' with motivational subtext. Duration pills row (pencil, 1h, 2h, 3h, 4h). 'Mejora tu concentración' section with blocked app toggles (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Facebook). Mentex Tweaks panel visible.
nodes.app_state: Active (Activo), Inactive state shown via Tweaks
nodes.greeting_text: Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para tu ritual de hoy?
nodes.greeting_subtext: Tu mente merece un momento sin ruido. Empieza eligiendo cuánto, qué apps callar y qué rutinas habitar.

nodes.label: Home Personalized Greeting Component
nodes.description: Personalized greeting section showing time-aware salutation ('Buenas tardes, Juan') combined with motivational ritual prompt ('¿Listo para tu ritual de hoy?'). Subtitle explains the app's core value proposition. This appears directly below the premium upsell carousel and above the focus session controls.
nodes.position: below premium banner, above duration pills

nodes.label: Home Screen Layout Architecture — Full Scroll Sections Order
nodes.description: Inferred full home screen section order from all four screenshots combined: 1) Premium carousel/banner (orange gradient, paginated), 2) Personalized greeting (time-aware, user name), 3) Duration selection pills (edit + 1h/2h/3h/4h), 4) Mejora tu concentración — blocked apps list with toggles, 5) Tu ritual de hoy — ritual cards with progress, 6) Mi aprendizaje del día — empty state CTA or content, 7) Recordatorios — active reminders list with add button. When in Activo state, protection bar and blocked app pills appear at the very top above all sections.

nodes.label: Focus Duration Selection Pills Row
nodes.description: Horizontal scrollable row of duration selection pills. Leftmost is a pencil/edit icon pill for custom duration. Then segmented options: 1h, 2h, 3h, 4h. Allows user to choose how long their focus session will be. Appears consistently across active and inactive home states.
